sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52714" key="kallipro/swpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καλλῐ-πρόσωπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful face</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Γαλάτεια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
